incident_summary: Incorrect cleaning agent (Quaternary Ammonium) applied to equipment AC-823 by operator OP-7884 after batch C9153A manufacture. Approved agent is IPA 70%.
root_cause_detail: Cleaning agents stored side-by-side in unlabelled containers on cleaning trolley. Operator selected wrong bottle. Cleaning agent inventory not controlled at point of use.
corrective_action: Equipment re-cleaned with correct approved agent. Residue swab tested — passed before next manufacturing use. Incorrect agent containers removed from area immediately.
preventive_action: Cleaning agents dispensed from locked cabinet — key released only after correct agent confirmed on cleaning record. Containers colour-coded per equipment type. Cleaning SOP updated with photo guide.
effectiveness_check: Zero incorrect cleaning agent events for 12 months. Monthly cleaning audit: 100% correct agent usage verified.
